case_title: MADISON KAVIYAKOEN VS. KRISTINA A. LEPORATI

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: ADDING MAILING ADDRESS OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF KAVIYAKOEN, MADISON DBA AIR PROVOCATEURS

ORDER (SC-222) ON REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS IS APPROVED, AND THE COURT ORDERS: A[X] PAYMENTS OF $70.00 ON THE 1ST DAY OF EACH MONTH STARTING (DATE) JANUARY 1, 2017 UNTIL (DATE OF FINAL PAYMENT) JANUARY 1, 2018. C[X] TOTAL AMOUNT OF PAYMENTS $910.00, WHICH INCLUDES INTEREST ON UNPAID BLANCE OF JUDGMENT. ACTUAL AMOUNT OF OF INTEREST MAY CHANGE IF PAYMENTS ARE MADE LATE OR EARLY.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT LEPORATI, KRISTINA A.
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL - GRANTED
(SC-220) REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT LEPORATI, KRISTINA A.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-12-2016 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JUN-22-2016 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT LEPORATI, KRISTINA A.
DECLARATION RE: CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF KAVIYAKOEN, MADISON DBA AIR PROVOCATEURS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KAVIYAKOEN, MADISON DBA AIR PROVOCATEURS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEPORATI, KRISTINA A. $750.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $840.00, IN LIEU OF PAYMENT AND AT THE ELECTION OF DEFENDANT, DEFENDANT MAY, NOT LATER THAN JULY 29, 2016, TURN OVER TO PLAINTIFF THE AEREAL EQUIPMENT THAT IS PART OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO PLAINTIFF RETURNED = RETURN TO SENDER, VACANT, UNABLE TO FORWARD
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF KAVIYAKOEN, MADISON DBA AIR PROVOCATEURS AS TO DEFENDANT LEPORATI, KRISTINA A.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY KAVIYAKOEN, MADISON DBA AIR PROVOCATEURS AS TO DEFENDANT LEPORATI, KRISTINA A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-12-2016 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00 SERVED APR-06-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LEPORATI, KRISTINA A.
RETURN MAIL: RE: NOTICE OF CONTINUANCE. UNABLE TO FORWARD (MADISON KAVIYAKOEN)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-22-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-22-2016 BY JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: L. FONG; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (506)
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $40.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO PLAINTIFF KAVIYAKOEN, MADISON DBA AIR PROVOCATEURS
